title: Vendor docs
body:
* add a section about vendoring and how to troubleshoot it to the install.md
* make sure that `make vendor` always uses the latest `vndr` to avoid potential inconsistencies with the CI

Cc: @baude @cevich @edsantiago

comments.body:

Ew, I missed one thing, namely to have `vendor: .install.vndr`.
